Yan Lian йЎҸйҖЈ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yan Lian (йЎҸйҖЈ)was born in Wuxi. Sent by Sun Yu to the no manвҖҷs land between Wei and Wu, he attracted many people to Wu. Yan Lian was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
